steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Combine the $x$-terms: $x + 2x = 3x$. Combine the constants: $5 + (-3) = 2$. The result is $3x + 2$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content:
• A: $3x -2$ — The constant is $+2$, not $-2$. Eliminated.
  • B: $3x + 2$ — Matches exactly. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
  • C: $3x -8$ — Incorrect constant; would require $5 - 3 = -8$, which is false. Eliminated.
  • D: $3x + 8$ — Incorrect constant; would require $5 + 3 = 8$, ignoring the minus sign. Eliminated.
